'''Ben Hu'al''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] student at the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
During his [[Sith training|training]] at the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|academy]], Ben was accepted into the academy and learn the arts of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], however, he was considered weak and an idiot by his fellow students. Hu'al believed he wouldn't be talented as a true [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] until [[Sith Master/Legends|Master]] [[Uthar Wynn]] instructed him and a group of acolytes to recapture a [[Mark VII experimental prototype assassin droid]], which had holed itself up in the [[Tomb of Marka Ragnos|tomb]] of [[Marka Ragnos]] in the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]]. He and his companions, including the droid's original creator who led the team, were killed in the attempt when he forgot to wear his [[Sound dampening stealth unit]].
